name: Mff Capital Investments Limited
analysis: MFF's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$5.0000, stop A$4.8510, target A$5.4470 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
